title: Dragon Rage makes both players draw 3 after destruction

card.rawText: When your opponent plays a magic card or lands an attack, negate the attack/magic card effect, and destroy all magic cards on the field. Both players then draw 3 cards.

plan.title: Dragon Rage makes both players draw 3 after destruction
plan.summary: After Dragon Rage negates and destroys magic, both players draw exactly 3 cards.

notes: Ensure each player has at least 3 cards remaining in deck.
Record both players' hand and deck counts immediately before Dragon Rage resolves.

steps: Player 2 plays Dragon Fire or another magic to trigger Dragon Rage.
Resolve negation, destroy magic, then draw step.
Compare both players' hand and deck counts to pre-resolution counts.
manualVerification: Confirm draw occurs after all magic destruction, not before.
Confirm both players draw even if triggering magic was negated.
riskNotes: Count deltas require fixture/log support; otherwise compare snapshots manually.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Supported draw resolver; validate sequencing within multi-effect Lightning.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
